tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Well the midnight headlight blind you on a rainy night[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]A[/ch]
Steep grade up ahead slow me down making no time[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
But I gotta keep a'rolling[/tab]

Those windshield wipers slapping out a tempo
[tab]                                             [ch]A[/ch]
Keeping perfect rhythm with the song on the radio[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
But I gotta keep a'rolling[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Ooh I'm driving my life away, looking for a better way, for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Ooh I'm driving my life away, looking for a sunny day[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Well the truckstop cutie coming on to me[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]A[/ch]
Tried to talk me into a ride, said I wouldn't be sorry[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
But she was just a baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Hey waitress pour me another cup of coffee[/tab]
[tab]                                                       [ch]A[/ch]
Pop it down, jack me up, shoot me out, flying down the highway[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
Lookin for the morning[/tab]
